name: Cappuccino Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Sift together dry ingredients.
3. Mix the butter, sour cream, half and half, and eggs until smooth.
4. Fold in the dry ingredients, orange zest, and chocolate, until just moistened.
5. Fill 12 muffin cups, bake until tops are firm, about 15 minutes.
